meta.northy_message: 54 days to Sept 1. $247K behind one unpulled phone lever. Infrastructure critical. Trust crisis at La Grange. Three calls before any terminal today, Steve.

act_now.title: La Grange ISD Trust Crisis — 24,732 Books Affected
act_now.detail: Sentinel flagged critical human-data risk: 'La Grange ISD trust broken, 24,732 books affected.' Johnny→Ford handoff. Separate from $5,550 PO — this is an operational trust breach.
act_now.action: Call Patrick/Jan immediately. What happened? Resolution path before it spreads.

act_now.title: Infrastructure Critical — DB at 125/80 Connections, Autopilot Death Spiral
act_now.detail: DB connections hit 125 (threshold 80). Autopilot dead 2.79+ hours. Pattern: connection balloon → autopilot crash → stale cycle. G-Brain runs the fleet. This is systemic.
act_now.action: Forge/Raju: connection pool investigation today. 15-min initial triage.

act_now.title: Garland $140K + CFB $107K — $247K Behind Unpulled Lever. 54 Days.
act_now.detail: Garland close deferred to July 31. CFB still Qualifying. Jodi Duron covers BOTH districts. Steve's Monday had zero revenue calls.
act_now.action: Call Jodi Duron today. Before any terminal. One call, $247K.

act_now.title: Revenue Target Contradiction — Zig Computing Against $1.5M. 7 Days Uncorrected.
act_now.detail: Zig's July 6 report: 'Gap to Commit ($1.5M by Aug 1): $1,240,845.' Canonical target is $1M by Sept 1. Entire sales team operating on wrong number.
act_now.action: ONE Slack message: 'Canonical target: $1M ARR by Sept 1.' 30 seconds.

act_now.title: Pipeline Blind — 54 Days Stale
act_now.detail: HubSpot to G-Brain ingestion never built. Agent fleet memory blind since May 13. 1-day build.
